---
name: New Persona Archetype
about: Propose a new reviewer persona type for the agent roster
title: "[Persona] "
labels: personas, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Persona name**
e.g., "Accessibility Auditor"

**What perspective does this persona bring?**
What unique evaluative lens would this agent apply?

**Suggested reasoning style**
analytical / creative / skeptical / pragmatic / synthesizing / visionary

**Scoring rubric (what would this persona rate?)**
e.g.,
- Contrast ratio compliance: 1-10
- Screen reader friendliness: 1-10
- Color blindness accessibility: 1-10

**When is this persona most useful?**
What content types or review scenarios benefit from this perspective?
